SUMMARY: Saud Abdullah Salem Abdulhamid (Arabic: سعود عبد الله سالم عبد الحميد; born 18 July 1999) is a Saudi professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team. He represented his nation at the 2020 Summer Olympics, 2022 FIFA World Cup, and 2023 AFC Asian Cup.
